org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class ContainerName

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ContainerName
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ErsapName

    public class ContainerName
extends java.lang.Object
implements ErsapName
    Unique identifier of a ERSAP container.

    The canonical name for a container has the following structure: 

      <dpe_canonical_name>:<container_name>
    Example: 
      10.1.1.1_java:master
    See Also:
    DpeName

      Identify a container with its DPE and name.

      Identify a container with its canonical name.
      ContainerName(java.lang.String host, ErsapLang lang, java.lang.String name)
      Identify a container with host and language of its DPE and name.

      • ContainerName

        public ContainerName(java.lang.String host,
                     ErsapLang lang,
                     java.lang.String name)
        Identify a container with host and language of its DPE and name.
        Parameters:
        host - the host address of the DPE
        lang - the language of the DPE
        name - the name of the container

      • ContainerName

                     java.lang.String name)
        Identify a container with its DPE and name.
        Parameters:
        dpe - the DPE of the container
        name - the name of the container

      • ContainerName

        public ContainerName(java.lang.String canonicalName)
        Identify a container with its canonical name.
        Parameters:
        canonicalName - the canonical name of the container

    • Method Detail

      • canonicalName

        public java.lang.String canonicalName()
        Description copied from interface: ErsapName
        Returns the canonical name of this ERSAP component.
        Specified by:
        canonicalName in interface ErsapName
        Returns:
        a string with the canonical name

      • name

        public java.lang.String name()
        Description copied from interface: ErsapName
        Returns the specific name of this ERSAP component. This is the last part of the canonical name.
        Specified by:
        name in interface ErsapName
        Returns:
        a string with the name part of the canonical name

      • address

        public ErsapAddress address()
        Description copied from interface: ErsapName
        Returns the address of the proxy used by this ERSAP component.

        address in interface ErsapName
        Returns:
        the address where the component is listening requests
